releases.title: What’s new in ChessEver Desktop v11.1
releases.subtitle: A smoother desktop workspace for tournaments, databases, and analysis.

entries.title: Tournament tabs keep your place
entries.summary: When you open a game and return, tournament Games, Standings, and About tabs restore your search text and scroll position.

entries.title: Open local databases in the current app
entries.summary: PGN and database files now open in ChessEver’s existing desktop window instead of starting a separate app session.

entries.title: Easier My Databases workflow
entries.summary: Library has smoother local database handling, drag-and-drop polish, clearer sidebar behavior, and cleaner game previews.

entries.title: Select and copy multiple games
entries.summary: Library game lists support Shift multi-select and copying several games at once for faster database work.

entries.title: Cleaner notation by default
entries.summary: Board notation now starts with letter pieces and inline variations, with event, date, and ECO shown above the moves.

entries.title: Mute sounds for one board tab
entries.summary: Turn off move sounds for a single board tab without muting the rest of the desktop app.

entries.title: Offline App usage
entries.summary: Use ChessEver Desktop when your connection drops.

entries.title: Database workspace
entries.summary: Open databases in their own workspace with search, a preview board, notation, and keyboard navigation.

entries.title: My Databases home
entries.summary: Library now starts as a database manager with cloud, TWIC, and local source tiles plus a quick preview area.

entries.title: Better notation navigation
entries.summary: Arrow-key navigation now follows visible expanded and collapsed variations more naturally.

entries.title: Notation collapse shortcuts
entries.summary: Collapse or expand notation variations from the board with matching Windows/Linux and macOS shortcuts.

entries.title: Copy and paste full games
entries.summary: Board copy now preserves full PGN variations, and paste can insert games into the active board flow.

entries.title: Keyboard-first game lists
entries.summary: Tournament, Favorites, Countrymen, and For You game screens are easier to browse with keyboard selection and paging.

entries.title: More reliable live game cards
entries.summary: Live game cards and opened board views stay in sync as moves, clocks, and results update.

entries.title: Smarter desktop search shortcut
entries.summary: Find/search shortcuts open search instead of interfering with board actions.

entries.title: Consistent player flags
entries.summary: Player flags now match more consistently across cards, game lists, and opened board views.

entries.title: Safer whole-database explorer
entries.summary: Whole Database filters are gated for launch stability while focused player and scoped explorer views remain available.
